---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
---

<!-- BUDGET JUSTIFICATION – 5 PAGE MAXIMUM per NSF PAPPG (II.D.2.f)
     Provide separate justification for each budget year.
     Justify all costs with specificity.

     SALARY CAP: Per PAPPG II.D.2.f(i), NSF limits salary compensation
     for each senior/key person to no more than TWO MONTHS of their
     regular salary in any one year, across all NSF-funded grants.
     Some program solicitations may override this — check yours.

     Check your solicitation for other program-specific budget rules. -->

# Budget Justification

## Senior Personnel

**PI Name (PI):** TODO: Justify salary support. Include months of effort
per year, salary basis, and fringe benefit rate. Example: "The budget
requests X months of summer salary in each year at the PI's current base
rate. Fringe benefits are charged at the institutionally negotiated rate
of XX%."

## Other Personnel

TODO: If applicable, justify postdoctoral researchers, graduate
students, undergraduate students, or other personnel. Include role,
effort level, and pay rate.

## Equipment

TODO: Justify any single items costing $5,000 or more (your institution's
capital equipment threshold may differ). Explain why each item is
necessary and not otherwise available.

## Travel

TODO: Justify all travel. For each trip, include destination, purpose,
duration, and cost breakdown (airfare, lodging, per diem, ground
transport). Use GSA per diem rates for domestic travel.

<!-- Example:
**Conference travel (Year 1):** One domestic conference trip for the PI
to present preliminary findings. Round-trip airfare ($500), 4 nights
lodging at GSA rate ($200/night; $800), meals and incidentals for 5 days
($79/day; $395). Total: $1,695.
-->

## Materials and Supplies

TODO: Justify computing equipment below the capital threshold, software
licenses, consumables, and other supplies.

## Other Direct Costs

TODO: Justify publication costs, participant support, subawards,
consultant services, computing time, or other direct costs.

## Indirect Costs (F&A)

TODO: State your institution's federally negotiated indirect cost rate,
the MTDC base, and the resulting F&A amount for each year.

<!-- Example:
Indirect costs are calculated at the university's federally negotiated
rate of XX% of modified total direct costs (MTDC). Year 1 MTDC: $XX,XXX;
F&A: $X,XXX. Year 2 MTDC: $XX,XXX; F&A: $X,XXX.
-->

## Budget Summary

<!-- Example summary table:
| Category | Year 1 | Year 2 | Total |
|:---------|-------:|-------:|------:|
| Senior Personnel | | | |
| Other Personnel | | | |
| Equipment | | | |
| Travel | | | |
| Materials & Supplies | | | |
| Other Direct Costs | | | |
| Total Direct Costs | | | |
| Indirect Costs (F&A) | | | |
| **Total** | | | |
-->
